name: mindgraf
description: MindGraf knowledge graph superpowers. Full brain CLI access, workflow skills for PM, fitness, comms, journaling, research, and quick capture — all wired to a personal knowledge graph.

mindgraf_path.title: MindGraf Repo Path
mindgraf_path.description: Absolute path to the secondbrain-claude repository on the host machine (e.g. /Users/you/secondbrain-claude)
